docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY.
